segments.text: You know your favorite restaurant could be shut down in 48 hours. Be it Mumbai, Bangalore, Kolkata, Chennai. In fact,
20% of Mumbai's restaurants have already shut and 50% could close in 2 days. Even Bangalore's iconic Vidyati Bhavan is
staring at closure. And I'm not saying this. The India Hotel and Restaurant Association is cuz here's what's happening, okay? India is running out of
LPG. So what the government has done is they've directed oil companies to prioritize households as they should.
But this also means all restaurants are getting cut off. Even refill cycles have been increased from 21 to 25 days. And this is all happening because India
imports nearly 90% of its LPG through the straight of hormones. A tiny choke point that's now strangled by the US
[music] Israel Iran conflict. That is literally all it took. One crisis and our entire food industry is on its knees. Now some restaurants are turning
to subsidized domestic cylenders on the black market just to stay open. But domestic cylenders are built differently. They are not meant for
commercial pressure and that's a serious safety risk. So this is honestly a wakeup call. If you can switch to induction staffs but for our country
honestly it's time to diversify where our energy comes from. Share this with your friends and family so they are prepared for what is
